title: Module Registry
business_purpose: Define a clear module registry screen contract for the approved Phase 1 read route.
primary_user_context: A platform or organization admin reviewing module status.
user_goal: See module availability status once registry read APIs are approved.
success_outcome: Registry UX expectations are defined while backend routes remain deferred.

visibility_rules.description: Visible under temporary Phase 1 capability coverage.

record_scope_behavior.description: Registry display may include global module state and organization applicability.

data_sources.label: Registry module list
data_sources.description: Reads approved Phase 1 module registry entries.

required_entities.purpose: Render module status once approved read APIs are available.

empty_data_behavior.title: No data yet
empty_data_behavior.message: No records are available yet for this screen.

empty_state.title: Nothing to show
empty_state.message: There is nothing to show yet.

loading_state.title: Loading
loading_state.message: Please wait while this screen loads.

error_state.title: Something went wrong
error_state.message: Please try again. If this continues, contact support.

permission_denied_state.title: Access denied
permission_denied_state.message: You do not have permission to open this screen.

forbidden_behaviors: No fake data may be shown in this screen.
No placeholder actions may be presented to users.
No hardcoded roles, units, or campuses are allowed.
No cross-organization data exposure is allowed.
No out-of-scope frontend or backend behavior may be implemented from this contract alone.
Do not fabricate module health or installation state beyond the approved Phase 1 read endpoint.
